description: Privileged bridge that injects sender-initial avatars into the about:3pane message list.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Begin observing all mail windows and inject avatars using the given config.

functions.name: updateConfig
functions.description: Push updated config to every injected message list (no restart).

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Disconnect observers and remove all injected avatars and styles.

functions.name: seedBimiCache
functions.description: Seed/replace the in-memory BIMI logo cache from persisted storage (JSON string of domain -> entry).

functions.name: testBimi
functions.description: Diagnostic: resolve a domain's BIMI logo (DNS + SVG, no DMARC gate) and return a step-by-step log plus the logo data URL.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: An email address or bare domain to test.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when injection encounters a recoverable error.

events.name: onBimiResolved
events.description: Fired when a domain's BIMI logo is resolved, so it can be persisted.
